title: HPOM-007: Shared-state metadata — flag stale or superseded files
description: Shared files need metadata headers: file, project, state_owner, status, last_verified, verified_against, confidence, supersedes, superseded_by. Create scripts/validate_shared_state.py that reads shared/ files, checks for required metadata, and flags STALE or SUPERSEDED files. Create templates/shared-state.md.
acceptance_criteria: validate_shared_state.py finds and reports shared/ files missing required metadata
STALE or SUPERSEDED status is flagged with file path and reason
template includes all required metadata fields
script can be run standalone: python3 MAP_System/scripts/validate_shared_state.py
